source_areas.description: Framework-neutral JavaScript token modules, package barrel exports, and public TypeScript declarations.
Canonical dark-mode CSS custom properties and shared animation keyframes exposed as package subpaths.
Package export metadata, public npm publication workflow, dependency-free parity checks, and package dry-run verification.
Generates the exhaustive package-entry, runtime-export, CSS custom-property, and keyframe inventory from source.

feature_surfaces.title: Brand and semantic color contract
feature_surfaces.description: Exports brand scales, dark surfaces, text and border roles, semantic states, presence colors, and resource categories.

feature_surfaces.title: Gradient and node recipes
feature_surfaces.description: Exports canonical brand, glass, border, decorative, and workflow-node gradient recipes for Flyto2 surfaces.

feature_surfaces.title: Elevation, focus, and motion
feature_surfaces.description: Exports elevation shadows, branded glows, focus rings, animation timings, easing curves, names, and keyframes.

feature_surfaces.title: Shape, spacing, layout, and typography
feature_surfaces.description: Exports shared radii, node shapes, spacing, shell dimensions, font stacks, and typography scale values.

feature_surfaces.title: JavaScript, CSS, and TypeScript delivery
feature_surfaces.description: Publishes framework-neutral JavaScript, CSS, animation, package metadata, and TypeScript declaration entry points.

feature_surfaces.title: Generated package contract reference
feature_surfaces.description: Records every current entry point, JavaScript export, CSS custom property, and keyframe and rejects generated documentation drift.
